leadText: Connecting Cave (Japanese: 地つなぎの洞穴 Connecting Cave) is a cave located in the Kalos region. It is also known as Zubat Roost (Japanese: ズバットたちのすみか Zubat Roost).

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Breeder Mercy's Japanese name, Ikue, and the fact that she uses a Pikachu , are references to Ikue Otani , the voice actress of Ash's Pikachu in Pokémon the Series .
